name: Ainu
notes: STRUCTURAL CONTACT STUB (not a modelled G2P target). Ainu is a language isolate of Hokkaido, treated in some accounts as a pre-Japonic contact / substrate layer in northern Japan. It exists here only so specs referencing it as a (debated, low-weight) contact node have something to resolve to; the grapheme set is a placeholder and no phonology is claimed (gn.json stub pattern).

sources.author: Shibatani, M.
sources.title: The Languages of Japan
sources.notes: Reference for Ainu and its contact status (contact node only).
